'''Birok''' was the leader of a [[Birok's gang|gang]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Diado]]. The members of his gang also called him '''"Boss"'''.

==Biography==
Birok was a criminal had close relations with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] which controlled the [[CIS Weapons Factory]]. When [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] [[Mission to Diado|came to]] Diado to steal a [[CIS-Advanced starfighter|Separatist starfighter prototype]], he ran into Birok and his [[Birok's gang|gang]]. Birok was killed inside the secret weapons factory that housed the fighter, when Tiin stole it and used its guns to blast the command center.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Birok first appeared in the short story ''[[It Takes a Thief]]'', which was one of four stories in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6|sixth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. He was created and penciled by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. Birok garnered an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
